description: Canonical spec for task display surfaces — documents what security, filtering, and sensitive content redaction each surface must apply. Shared between Flutter (Dart) and web (TypeScript).

conventions.accessControl: 'group_filter' = filter tasks by group membership (admins see all, public groups visible to all, private groups require membership). 'single_item_check' = verify user can access a specific task. 'assigned_to_current_user' = implicitly filtered to tasks assigned to the current user. 'none' = no access control needed.
conventions.sensitiveRedaction: 'admin_or_group_admin' = admins and group admins see sensitive content; all others see redacted placeholder text. 'none' = no sensitive content displayed on this surface.
conventions.filters: Array of filter types that must be available on this surface. Each platform implements these filters but the set must match.

surfaces.name: Tasks List
surfaces.description: Main paginated task list with filtering, search, and multiple view modes (table, cards, calendar)

surfaces.name: Dashboard — My Tasks
surfaces.description: Tasks assigned to the current user, shown on the dashboard. Implicitly filtered by assignment so access control is inherent.

surfaces.name: Dashboard — Feed
surfaces.description: Activity feed showing completed tasks and care reasons. Group-filtered.

surfaces.name: Member Detail — Related Tasks
surfaces.description: Tasks linked to a specific church member, shown on their detail page. Must be group-filtered so users don't see tasks from private groups they don't belong to.

surfaces.name: Care Reason Detail — Related Tasks
surfaces.description: Tasks linked to a specific care reason. Must be group-filtered.

surfaces.name: Task Detail
surfaces.description: Full detail view of a single task including notes. Must verify the current user has access to this task's groups before displaying any content.

surfaces.name: Task Detail Drawer
surfaces.description: Desktop drawer variant of task detail. Same security rules as task_detail.

surfaces.name: Task Edit Form
surfaces.description: Edit form for an existing task. Must verify user can access the task before showing the form. Sensitive redaction is not applicable since the user is editing.

surfaces.name: Goal Detail — Completed Tasks
surfaces.description: Completed tasks contributing to a goal. Group-filtered.

surfaces.name: Reports
surfaces.description: Analytics and CSV export of task data. Group-filtered. Sensitive content in exports must be redacted for non-privileged users.
